news.title: CORRECTION: Snowflake Q4 Adj. EPS $0.32 Beats $0.27 Estimate, Sales $1.284B Beat $1.255B Estimate
news.summary: Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) reported quarterly earnings of $0.32 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $0.27 by 18.08 percent. This is a 6.67 percent increase over earnings of $0.30 per share from the same

news.title: What's Going On With Snowflake Stock Monday?
news.summary: Snowflake Inc (SNOW) shares fell due to market weakness and cautious investors. Analysts cut price forecasts ahead of earnings report.

news.title: This Snowflake Analyst Slashes Price Target Ahead Of Q4 Print
news.summary: BTIG analyst Gray Powell cuts price target to $235 for Snowflake (SNOW) citing 25% revenue growth and new product initiatives.

news.title: Snowflake Inc. (NYSE:SNOW) Q4 Earnings Beat Tempered by Cautious Outlook
news.summary: Snowflake's Q4 earnings beat estimates, but its in-line FY 2027 outlook tempers investor enthusiasm despite strong AI adoption and customer growth.

news.title: Snowflake Stock Pops Then Drops Following Q4 Earnings: What You Need To Know
news.summary: Snowflake posts financial results for the fourth quarter on Wednesday. Here's a rundown of the AI data cloud company's report.

news.title: Snowflake Q4 Preview: Will Earnings Sink The Stock Again Amid 'AI Disruption Fear Trade'?
news.summary: Snowflake reports Q4 financial results Wednesday, as the software sector faces investor attention and pressure.

news.title: Snowflake: The AI Data Cloud Inflection Point (Q4 Earnings Preview)
Stifel Maintains Buy on Snowflake, Lowers Price Target to $225
news.summary: Stifel  analyst Brad Reback   maintains Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $280 to $225.

news.title: BTIG Maintains Buy on Snowflake, Lowers Price Target to $235
news.summary: BTIG  analyst Gray Powell   maintains Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $312 to $235.

news.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Snowflake, Lowers Price Target to $270
news.summary: TD Cowen  analyst Bill Katz   maintains Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $300 to $270.
